name: chatgpt-chat-export
description: Shared workflow-core skill and scripts for exporting ChatGPT chats through Chrome DevTools MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Export recent ChatGPT chats into repo-tracked markdown.
interface.longDescription: Uses Chrome DevTools MCP plus deterministic local rendering to save recent ChatGPT conversations and last answers into chats/.
defaultPrompt: List my 10 most recent ChatGPT chats.
Export this ChatGPT conversation to chats/.
Export only the last assistant answer.
